subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Thy brief and original letter was received, and its contents were endowed with the utmost eloquence and literary excellence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه مختصر بدیعت واصل و مضمون در نهایت فصاحت و بلاغت بود جوامع
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @silence; fewness of words, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @praise and encouragement
